The [[GoCorp/Legends|GoCorp]] '''Arunskin 32 cargo skiff''' was a utilitarian 17.2-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Skiff/Legends|craft]]. It was a modification of the [[Bantha-II cargo skiff/Legends|Bantha-II cargo skiff]] with a tougher chassis.<ref name="GG7" />

{{Veh-stub}}
